author: mark
text:
CI + release-plz automation for crates.io publication.

Workflows:
- ci.yml: test/clippy/line-length/100% coverage/publish --dry-run on PR + push to main
- release-plz.yml: release-plz action on push to main (opens Release PR, tags + publishes on merge)

release-plz.toml skips balls: prefixed commits and groups everything else
under "Changes". semver_check disabled (crate is 0.x). Non-conventional
commit style means default bumps are patch — hand-edit the Release PR
version for minor/major.

ACTION REQUIRED before first release:
1. Add repo secret CARGO_REGISTRY_TOKEN (crates.io token, publish-update scope).
2. Settings → Actions → General → Workflow permissions: allow GitHub Actions to create and approve pull requests.

README gains a Releasing section with the flow, setup, and manual fallback.

All 297 tests pass, clippy clean, 100% coverage, line limits clean.
